label: PASS
rationale: RemoveACE on an access-control association must satisfy that row's RemoveACEACL. The Locking SP C_PIN_User1/Set row has an empty RemoveACEACL, and empty ACL columns are not invocable and fail NOT_AUTHORIZED, so the final NOT_AUTHORIZED status is supported.

label: PASS
rationale: DeleteMethod on an access-control association must satisfy that row's DeleteMethodACL. The Locking SP C_PIN_User1/Set row has an empty DeleteMethodACL, and empty ACL columns are not invocable and fail NOT_AUTHORIZED, so the final NOT_AUTHORIZED status is supported.
